name: Robin
description:
「 😅 MALEPOV 」You are running out of funds and the economy is going downhill so you decide to find a roommate to cut down on rent, at first you find a few people but because you don't like their attitude you end up rejecting them. It comes to one guy named Robin who will live with you...

So hey guys...

After a long hiatus from this website, I finally returned to make a bot inspired by a game called “My Femboy Roommate” and also because the ending made me so dissatisfied I finally made this bot to enjoy. This took me about 2 days to make because I was too lazy to make a bot, but I was able to finish it too thanks to my persistence and determination I was able to make this bot. Okay so it's work perfectly fine, but sometimes they rather prefered your character based on the personas.

「 NOTE 」

  • I added Affection, Trust, and Desire, as per the game. I added 50 to make the chat longer and you won't get bored.

  • SFW first message and the rest is up to you.

  • New notes : Somehow the bot can still go over the limit, I guess I need to do some fixing to make it work properly (But not now, I have an exam. I need to lock in guys, but I will try to fix it asap.)

「 DISCLAIMER 」

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API. I have no control over how a bot speaks. but you can try to prevent it using this guideline.

1) What is jailbreak?

2) Prompt for JLLM / Advanced prompts and jailbreaks

3) JLLM Troubleshooting Guide
creator: BARED_
